Home / Service Areas / Minnetonka

Electrical contractor in Minnetonka, MN

Trusted local professionals serving Minnetonka and surrounding communities

Serving Minnetonka, MN

J-Sim Electric Inc. is a leading provider of electrical solutions in Minnetonka, Minnesota. Known for its blend of residential areas and commercial centers, Minnetonka requires a wide range of electrical services. We cater to both residential and commercial clients, ensuring safety, efficiency, and reliability. From upgrading electrical panels to installing energy-efficient lighting, our team is equipped to handle any project. We understand the importance of a dependable electrical system, especially during Minnetonka's harsh winters, and we are committed to providing top-quality service at competitive prices.

We understand the electrical demands of Minnetonka's diverse properties and offer customized solutions for homes and businesses alike.
